category_sources: source_facts.description says GNU data recovery tool; GNU project page describes ddrescue as a data recovery tool for copying data from failing devices/files.
display_name_sources: GNU project page title and introduction identify the project as GNU ddrescue; source_facts.name is ddrescue.
docs_sources: GNU project page links the online ddrescue manual and serves as the official package page.
repo_sources: GNU Savannah page is the official CVS repository page for the GNU ddrescue project; source_facts.repo was empty.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; GNU project page describes rescuing data from block devices/files, mapfiles, ddrescuelog, and recovery workflows.
